title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About GAP India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India Asia Pacific Associates!
